CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Continued To Aug-02-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs JENNIFER CREELMAN and ALFRED DRIGGS, IV's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED as to the Fourth Cause of Action for Invasion of Privacy. Plaintiff fails to specifically state that Defendant entered into a space where Plaintiff had a reasonable expectation of privacy. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend per statute. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Continued To May-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs JENNIFER CREELMAN and ALFRED DRIGGS, IV's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to May 10, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than April 21, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing counsel is ordered to provide a declaration addressing failure to engage in meet and confer efforts (See Declaration of Robert Maltz) no later than April 21, 2017. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
